# flashblade_object_store_access_policy (Data Source)

Reads an existing FlashBlade object store access policy by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_object_store_access_policy" "example" {
  name = "existing-s3-policy"
}

output "oap_arn" {
  value = data.flashblade_object_store_access_policy.example.arn
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the object store access policy to look up.

### Read-Only

- `arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the policy.
- `description` (String) A human-readable description of the policy.
- `enabled` (Boolean) If true, the policy is enabled.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the object store access policy.
- `is_local` (Boolean) If true, the policy is local to this array (not replicated).
- `policy_type` (String) The type of the policy (e.g. 'object-store-access').
